title: baccharis marginalis var. longipes
intro: Baccharis marginalis var. longipes, also known as Coyote Tobacco, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to help soothe and heal various health issues. The medicinal properties of Baccharis marginalis var. longipes are believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
